title: polypodium longicaule
intro: Polypodium longicaule, also known as Polypodium leucotomos, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in various cultures for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been shown to have health benefits, including protecting the skin from UV radiation, reducing inflammation, and fighting against certain diseases. Polypodium longicaule can be prepared as an herbal supplement, typically in capsule or powder form, or as a topical cream or ointment.
